nodes.name: LC

nodes.name: White-headed vanga
nodes.summary: White-headed vanga（Artamella viridis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-headed vanga。

nodes.name: Artamella
nodes.summary: Artamella（Artamella）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-headed vanga。

nodes.name: White-headed vanga
nodes.summary: The white-headed vanga (Artamella viridis) is a species of bird in the family Vangidae. It is monotypic within the genus Artamella. It is endemic to Madagascar, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest, subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. Taxonomy and systematics Former Species Formerly, some authorities also considered the black-and-crimson oriole to be a species within the genus Artamella. References
nodes.shortSummary: The white-headed vanga (Artamella viridis) is a species of bird in the family Vangidae. It is monotypic within the genus Artamella.
